properties.name: Advice
properties.location: Norlane, Bell Park, Corio, North Geelong, North Shore
properties.webBody:
This Advice message is being issued for Bell Park, Corio, Norlane, North Geelong, North Shore.
  • There is a building fire in Sparks Road, Norlane.
  • Smoke may be visible from nearby roads and communities. 
There is currently no threat to the community, but you should continue to stay informed and monitor conditions.
What you should do: 
  • Keep the roads clear so emergency services can respond. 
  • If you are sensitive to smoke or you live with someone who is sensitive to smoke, you should close windows and doors. Turn off heating and cooling systems.
  • To prevent the smell of smoke entering your home or business, close windows and doors.  
Impacts in your area: 
  • Traffic may be affected and smoke may be visible between Seabeach Pde. and Anakie Road and also between Goldsworth Rd and Cowie street.
  • Emergency services may remain in the area.
  • Traffic in the area will be affected.
  • Check the VicTraffic website (www.traffic.transport.vic.gov.au) or call 13 11 70 for road closures.
This message was issued by ESTA.

The next update is expected by 17/03/2026 09:40 pm or as the situation changes.

Use multiple sources to stay informed: 

  • www.emergency.vic.gov.au
  • VicEmergency Hotline - freecall 1800 226 226
  • VicEmergency app
  • Facebook or Twitter (#vicfires)
  • Tune in to ABC Local Radio, commercial and designated community radio stations, or Sky News TV.
Accessibility:
The following services can help you, or someone you know, access information during an emergency.
  • To access this information in other languages call the Translating and Interpreting Service on 131 450 (freecall) and ask them to call VicEmergency Hotline.
  • If you are deaf, hard of hearing, or have a speech/communication impairment contact the National Relay Service and ask them to call the VicEmergency Hotline.
properties.text:
ADVICE - STRUCTURE FIRE - Stay Informed
Incident Location: Sparks Rd, Norlane
Issue Date: Tuesday 17 March 2026, 08:36 pm
Next Update: Tuesday 17 March 2026, 09:40 pm

More details at http://emergency.vic.gov.au/respond/#!/warning/41708/moreinfo

This Advice message is being issued for Bell Park, Corio, Norlane, North Geelong, North Shore.
- There is a building fire in Sparks Road, Norlane.
- Smoke may be visible from nearby roads and communities. 


There is currently no threat to the community, but you should continue to stay informed and monitor conditions.

properties.name: Community Information
properties.location: between the townships of  Irrewillipe, Kawarren, Lovat, Wimba, Charleys Creek, Carlisle River and covers the township of Gellibrand
properties.webBody:
This Community Information message is being issued for between the townships of Irrewillipe, Kawarren, Lovat, Wimba, Charleys Creek, Carlisle River and covers the township of Gellibrand. 
  • There is a bushfire at Carlisle River that is under control.
  • This Community Information replaces the message issued on 8 March 2026.
  • Firefighters are currently patrolling this fire.
  • Please observe all track closures. 
There is currently no threat to the community however be aware of crews and heavy machinery working to rehabilitate affected tracks and stabilising areas of the fire ground.
This message was issued by Forest Fire Management Victoria.


Use multiple sources to stay informed: 
  • www.emergency.vic.gov.au
  • VicEmergency Hotline - freecall 1800 226 226
  • VicEmergency app
  • Facebook or Twitter (#vicfires).
  • Tune in to ABC Local Radio, commercial and designated community radio stations, or Sky News TV.
Accessibility:
The following services can help you, or someone you know, access information during an emergency.
  • To access this information in other languages call the Translating and Interpreting Service on 131 450 (freecall) and ask them to call VicEmergency Hotline.  
  • If you are deaf, hard of hearing, or have a speech/communication impairment contact National Relay Service for assistance and ask them to call the VicEmergency Hotline.
properties.text:
COMMUNITY INFORMATION - BUSHFIRE - Stay Informed
Incident Location: Carlisle River
Issue Date: Friday 13 March 2026, 09:41 am
Next Update: Friday 20 March 2026, 01:50 pm

More details at http://emergency.vic.gov.au/respond/#!/warning/41706/moreinfo

This Community Information message is being issued for between the townships of  Irrewillipe, Kawarren, Lovat, Wimba, Charleys Creek, Carlisle River and covers the township of Gellibrand. 
- There is a bushfire at Carlisle River that is under control.
- This Community Information replaces the message issued on 8 March 2026.
- Firefighters are currently patrolling this fire.
- Please observe all track closures. 


There is currently no threat to the community however be aware of crews and heavy machinery working to rehabilitate affected tracks and stabilising areas of the fire ground.
